input.testCaseTitle: SAG should come on the selection of PMG
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-345 reported defect: SAG should come on the selection of PMG
input.errorMessage: SAG should come on the selection of PMG

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: SAG dropdown master data was not aligned to the selected PMG. Some PMGs had extra test SAG values and at least one expected SAG value was missing until the PMG-SAG options were corrected.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.93. code-bug is an acceptable second label if the model frames it as dropdown-filter logic.
